title: BUG #17271: Updating enum columns type fails when constraints exist
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE example (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, direction TEXT NOT NULL, below BOOLEAN NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMP TABLE example_temp AS SELECT id, direction, below FROM example;
INSERT INTO example (id, direction, below) SELECT id, direction, below FROM example_temp;
key_bug_features: Updating enum columns type with existing constraints
